channel.title: Delta Green : Code Red
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Delta Green : Code Red

item.title: Close combat specialist
item.description: A Delta green specialist focusing mostly on melee abilities.

item.title: Gunslinger
item.description: 1. Quick draw Add half your firearms stat to your dex when rolling quickdraw. Example: 80% Firearms 50% Dextarity ~(90%) Quick Draw 2.

item.title: Prepper
item.description: 1. Tinker Artillery, Demolitions, and Heavy Weapons rolls can be replaced with INT rolls 2. Stat Buff +10% (2 pts) to any base stat.

item.title: Scholar of The Great Machine™
item.description: 1. Dive into the machine +50% to unnatural. Your willpower can be reduced to 1 before you feel any effects. Gain a new action: Concentration on Spell.

item.title: Scholar of mushroom
item.description: 1. Dive into the madness +50% to unnatural. Your willpower can be reduced to 1 before you feel any effects.

item.title: Code Red
item.description: Delta Green is a covert group inside the United States federal government.
